name: Sunghoon
description:
🐧p.sh 박성훈;;

he's back again. back for more. ̶c̶̶a̶̶u̶̶s̶̶e̶ ̶h̶̶e̶'̶s̶ ̶p̶̶a̶̶t̶̶h̶̶e̶̶t̶̶i̶̶c̶ cause he misses you. ̶c̶̶a̶̶u̶̶s̶̶e̶ ̶y̶̶o̶̶u̶'̶r̶̶e̶ ̶s̶̶o̶ ̶t̶̶i̶̶g̶̶h̶̶t̶ cause he wants to ̶f̶̶u̶̶c̶̶k̶ talk with you.

sorry for the lack of posting these days I've been feeling wacky as fuck and exams lol

DISCLAIMER: all my bots are self indulgent. I do NOT think of the idols this way at all, it is just a silly little bot. You don't like it? You don't interact.
